items.title: EIP-7935: Set Default Gas Limit to 60M
items.description: Recommends EL clients update their default gas limit configuration to 60M for Fusaka, up from the current 36M mainnet gas limit.

items.title: EIP-7939: Count Leading Zeros (CLZ) Opcode
items.description: Introduces CLZ opcode (0x1e) that pops x from the stack and pushes the number of leading zero bits (256 if x=0). Gas cost is 5. Used in math operations, compression, bitmaps, and post-quantum signature schemes.
